violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (2 pts): Shelving inside reachin cooler and microwave interior noted not in good repair (Rusting and peeling).
THAWING POTENTIALLY HAZARDOUS FOOD (2 pts): Potentially hazardous foods (Squid and salmon) noted not being thawed using approved methods
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Microwave interior stainless prep counter clean dish shelving in kitchen reachin cooler/freezer interiors and pop nozzle noted not properly cleaned.
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Hood and filters inside and outside duct outlets noted not clean.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors walls and ceilings in food prep areas noted need cleaning under and around in place equipment. | FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors walls and ceilings throughout facility need repair work. Most attention needed in kitchen and ware-washing areas. Peeling paint needs removed. Wall directly behind grill are needs cleaning due to food and grease splash. Lower level walkin cooler floor walls and ceiling in need of repair. Curtains to kitchen need cleaning.
